title: ACAT Human Score Submission
description: Schema for human rater scores against an existing ACAT assessment. Linked to acat_assessments_v1 via assessment_id. Per Z2-IC-02 (S-053026-02): human scores stored in linked table acat_human_scores. Per Z2-IC-03: rater_id is an anonymous token by default.

assessment_id.description: UUID or string ID of the existing acat_assessments_v1 row being rated.

rater_id.description: Optional. System-generated anonymous token if omitted. Self-identified string allowed. PII must not be submitted here.

rated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the human rating was completed. Set server-side if omitted.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the human rater.
